evals.prompt: Show me the top trending YouTube videos today and save a report.
evals.expected_output: A markdown report saved to reports/youtube/YYYY-MM-DD.md with a Top Videos section (20 rows) and a Top Shorts section (20 rows). The file must exist on disk.

assertions.name: report_file_written
assertions.description: A .md file exists under reports/youtube/ named with today's date

assertions.name: top_videos_section_present
assertions.description: The report contains a '## Top Videos' section with at least one table row

assertions.name: top_shorts_section_present
assertions.description: The report contains a '## Top Shorts' section with at least one table row (or explicit no-data note)

assertions.name: no_hallucinated_metrics
assertions.description: Report does not mention CTR, RPM, retention, or subscriber count

assertions.name: user_confirmation_given
assertions.description: Claude tells the user the file path and how many items were captured

evals.prompt: Generate a YouTube trending report for Japan (JP region).
evals.expected_output: A markdown report saved to reports/youtube/YYYY-MM-DD.md with region JP in the header, containing Top Videos and Top Shorts sections.

assertions.name: report_file_written
assertions.description: A .md file exists under reports/youtube/ named with today's date

assertions.name: region_jp_in_header
assertions.description: The report header mentions 'JP' as the region

assertions.name: top_videos_section_present
assertions.description: The report contains a '## Top Videos' section

assertions.name: top_shorts_section_present
assertions.description: The report contains a '## Top Shorts' section

evals.prompt: What are the top YouTube Shorts right now? Save a report to the usual place.
evals.expected_output: A markdown report at reports/youtube/YYYY-MM-DD.md. The Shorts section must be populated. The videos section may also be present.

assertions.name: top_shorts_section_present
assertions.description: The report contains a '## Top Shorts' section with at least one row or a no-data note

assertions.name: data_source_noted
assertions.description: The report footer mentions the data source (MCP or yt-dlp)

assertions.name: user_confirmation_given
assertions.description: Claude confirms the file path to the user
